name: Claude Instant 1.2
note: Fast, low-cost tier that seeded the later Haiku lineage; 100K context, improved math/coding/safety over v1.1.

results.notes: Reported by Anthropic as a Codex/HumanEval-style coding eval, up from 52.8% on v1.1

Stanford HELM Lite leaderboard, row explicitly labeled 'Claude Instant 1.2' (verified this is the correct dot-release, distinct from the 'Claude Instant' row used in Anthropic's own July 2023 model card, which cross-checks to v1.1 by its matching GSM8K=80.9% baseline figure -- that mismatched-version data was deliberately excluded from this submission). MMLU EM = 0.631.
Stanford HELM Lite leaderboard, 'Claude Instant 1.2' row: MATH (Equivalent, CoT) = 0.499.
Stanford HELM Lite leaderboard, 'Claude Instant 1.2' row: OpenbookQA EM = 0.844.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: released August 9, 2023 per Anthropic's own announcement. Codex/coding score 58.7% (up from 52.8%) and GSM8K 86.7% (up from 80.9%) confirmed verbatim via direct fetch of anthropic.com/news/releasing-claude-instant-1-2. 100K context and $1.63/$5.51 per M token pricing confirmed via Anthropic's official pricing PDFs (July 2023 and Nov 2023), which explicitly list 'Claude Instant: 100,000 tokens, Prompt $1.63/M, Completion $5.51/M'. Also confirmed both Claude 1 and Claude Instant models were retired Nov 6, 2024. No changes made.
